name: Akkermansia muciniphila insulin-resistant volunteer pilot study
summary: Single-center randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled pilot testing daily live or pasteurized Akkermansia muciniphila for three months in overweight or obese insulin-resistant volunteers.
population: Overweight or obese insulin-resistant adult volunteers

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Live Biotherapeutics and Engineered Microbes because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers, safety, and mechanistic endpoints in Overweight or obese insulin-resistant adult volunteers. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
